description_long: This desk features a modern, geometric design with a rectangular wooden top framed by a light gray border. The base consists of two sturdy, open rectangular legs connected by three horizontal black slats on each side, giving it a layered, architectural appearance. The front of the desk includes a central black drawer with a prominent white handle, providing storage space. The color palette combines natural wood grain with contrasting black and gray elements, creating a visually striking and contemporary look. The materials appear to be a combination of wood and painted or coated metal, ensuring both durability and style. The overall construction suggests a robust and functional piece suitable for urban or professional environments.
description: A modern desk with a wooden top, gray frame, black slatted sides, and a central drawer with a white handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden top, gray frame, black slatted sides, and central drawer with a white handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the wooden top and the stacked black slats on the leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the desk, with the black slatted sides and no visible drawer handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden top and the layered black slats on the leg.
attribute_orientation: The side with the central drawer and white handle is intended to face the user, with the slatted sides forming the desk's legs and the wooden top serving as the main work surface.
